sourceOfTruth: Inventory + pipeline: docs/rn-nclex-rn-lesson-library.md. Authoring alignment: data/premium-lessons-nclex-core-v1/ + src/content/pathway-lessons/nclex-rn-source-checklist.json — run node scripts/audit-rn-nclex-map.mjs after map changes.

stagedBuildPhases.label: Adult health (high-yield RN systems)
stagedBuildPhases.description: Core med-surg and systems nursing: cardiovascular through infectious disease. Highest exam volume per lesson hour.

stagedBuildPhases.label: Emergency / critical care
stagedBuildPhases.description: Resuscitation, shock, airway, procedural emergencies, unstable presentations — after core systems are in catalog.

stagedBuildPhases.label: Pharmacology
stagedBuildPhases.description: Drug/class monographs and high-alert systems (canonical rows often owned here even when cross-listed under systems).

stagedBuildPhases.label: Pediatrics
stagedBuildPhases.description: Age-specific and pediatric-predominant conditions (cross-refs from adult map deduplicated to one primary slug).

stagedBuildPhases.label: Mental health
stagedBuildPhases.description: Psychiatric conditions, crises, and related medication safety.

stagedBuildPhases.label: Remaining supportive / NCLEX priorities
stagedBuildPhases.description: Prioritization, delegation, safety systems, consent, pain multimodal — capstone supportive lessons.

derivedFrom: Per-category title inventory: CATEGORIES in this script (single source before JSON export)

archetypeDefinitions.condition_disease: Disease, syndrome, or system-specific clinical lesson (primary owner not pharm / emergency / NCLEX-priorities).
archetypeDefinitions.medication_monograph: Drug or drug-class lesson (primary category pharmacology_master).
archetypeDefinitions.emergency_critical_care: Emergency, critical care, perioperative crisis, or unstable-presentation lesson (primary category emergency_critical_perioperative).
archetypeDefinitions.nursing_priorities_safety: Prioritization, delegation, ethics, safety systems (primary category nclex_nursing_priorities_safety).

sourceMap.duplicateHandling: Titles appearing in multiple CATEGORIES are merged to one canonical row; PRIMARY_OWNER + mergeNote set primary hub; secondaryCategoryIds preserve hub navigation without second catalog slugs.

crossListedLessons.mergeNote: Also emergency; single lesson with ventilator content.
Also emergency list; single high-yield lesson.
Pediatrics hub links; developmental + family (see secondary).
Also emergency; one procedural nursing lesson.
Merge with Heparin monograph + monitoring subsection; CV list references same slug.
Also emergency; psychiatric meds + crisis stabilization.
Cross-listed from endocrine_metabolic_fluids; canonical lesson emphasizes newborn assessment, feeds, and protocols.
Mental health category lists same title; single monograph with tyramine dietary counseling.
Also emergency critical; vent modes + nursing monitoring.
Also emergency/critical; one RN lesson, PE pathophys + nursing + anticoag.
Canonical critical-care spine; hematology list references.
Mental health cross-list; QT/ECG monitoring emphasized.

tierAMustInclude: NCLEX red flags / unsafe options / first actions

tierSummary.A: High-yield med-surg, emergency, ICU concepts, maternity emergencies, major pediatric disorders.
tierSummary.B: Standard condition lessons — still detailed and exam useful.
tierSummary.D: Narrow support or quick-reference teaching — still a complete idea, not a stub.

principles: No shallow notes; no unstructured bloat — follow the exam-complete premium spine (section kinds + headings).
Scan-friendly: clear headings, short paragraphs, bold key terms sparingly.
Clinically useful: every block ties to assessment, action, or an exam trap.
Written for RN exam prep: prioritization, safety, scope, communication.
antiPatterns: Notes below the tier word band or below premium section minimums
Giant essays without the structured spine
Filler repetition to inflate word count
Generic intros that could apply to any topic
